mnemonics.title: APPLICATIONS
mnemonics.content:
A - Architecture Design Influence
P - Program Translation (Binary, Hardware)
P - Productivity Tools (IDEs, Linters)
L - Language Implementation (Compilers, JIT)
I - Interoperability (Marshaling)
C - Code Optimization for Hardware
A - Analysis (Static, Dynamic)
T - Target-Specific Code Generation
I - Intermediate Representations
O - Overall Software Ecosystem
N - New Programming Paradigms
S - (is the result of all the above)
